creator: echoxxzz@gmail.com
text:
On new FreeBSD installs ddclient will not start if the ddclient.conf file contains the ipv6=yes parameter. 

The following errors are logged:

ddclient[1086]: FATAL:    Error loading the Perl module IO::Socket::INET6 needed for ipv6 connect.
ddclient[1086]: FATAL:     On Debian, the package libio-socket-inet6-perl must be installed.
ddclient[1086]: FATAL:     On Red Hat, the package perl-IO-Socket-INET6 must be installed.
dclient[1086]: FATAL:     On Alpine, the package perl-io-socket-inet6 must be installed.

I was able to fix it by modifying the port Makefile and changing the RUN_DEPENDS from:

RUN_DEPENDS=    p5-Data-Validate-IP>0:net-mgmt/p5-Data-Validate-IP

to this:

RUN_DEPENDS=    p5-Data-Validate-IP>0:net-mgmt/p5-Data-Validate-IP \
                p5-IO-Socket-INET6>2.72:net/p5-IO-Socket-INET6
